visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins in a Costco warehouse store with high industrial shelves and refrigerated cases in the background. A young woman with dark hair, wearing a purple knit sweater and a fuzzy patterned hat, holds a product box of 'Monk Jumps Over the Wall' soup. She smiles broadly and gestures toward the camera with the box. (2) The scene shifts to an indoor living space with beige walls and soft lighting. The woman from the first phase is now seated at a table with a second woman wearing a black top. They display the product box and a large transparent vacuum-sealed bag containing broth and solid ingredients. (3) A close-up view shows a person's hands using scissors to cut open the plastic ingredient bag. The contents are poured into a blue-and-black enameled cast-iron pot on a stovetop. Steam rises as the soup begins to boil, showing pieces of taro, mushrooms, and meatballs. (4) The two women are back in the frame, each holding a bowl and a spoon. They take bites of the soup, exhibiting cheerful facial expressions and nodding in approval. They gesture towards the pot and the camera while talking. Large, colorful text overlays appear frequently across the bottom and center of the frame.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Variety]: 熱量超低 379元. [Slogan]: 隨緣新出的 佛跳牆. (2) [Subtitle]: 隨緣新出佛跳牆. [Subtitle]: 叫妹妹煮給我吃. (3) [Subtitle]: 煮給我吃. [Slogan]: 付我錢. [Subtitle]: 哇! 他熱量也太低了吧. (4) [Subtitle]: 而且隨緣我一直以為只有泡麵. [Subtitle]: 沒想到現在有很多冷凍食品. [Subtitle]: 回去試看看 那麼便宜. (5) [Slogan]: 隨緣猴頭菇佛跳牆. [Slogan]: $379. (6) [Subtitle]: 1.2公斤 379元. [Subtitle]: 裡面有一包. [Subtitle]: 打開加熱煮滾 5-10分鐘可以吃. (7) [Variety]: 打開包裝. [Variety]: 料超多. (8) [Slogan]: 有香菇、蓮子、紅棗 還有滿滿芋頭. (9) [Subtitle]: 好香喔! 聞到就餓了. [Subtitle]: 而且他超級多猴頭菇. (10) [Slogan]: 猴頭菇營養價值超高. [Slogan]: 除了高蛋白低脂肪 還能促進新陳代謝. (11) [Slogan]: 筍片吃起來很脆 猴頭菇非常Q彈. (12) [Subtitle]: 最重要是小香菇跟這個素排骨酥. [Slogan]: 都吸飽湯汁 非常美味. (13) [Slogan]: 綿綿芋頭 化在湯裡. (14) [Slogan]: 喝完身體會暖暖的. (15) [Slogan]: 好溫暖喔. [Slogan]: 吃完不會空虛. (16) [Subtitle]: 過年家人長輩 一同享用. [Slogan]: 快速上菜. [Slogan]: 省去熬煮的時間 超推薦. (17) [Slogan]: 真的不輸葷食 佛跳牆. (18) [Slogan]: 738大卡! 超低!. (19) [Slogan]: 過年吃更加無負擔. [Slogan]: 推薦.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators appearing throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman wears a purple knit sweater and a grey/black fuzzy patterned hat; the other wears a black long-sleeved top with a heart-shaped cutout.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Industrial shelving and refrigerators in Costco; a modern apartment living room with a white couch and a kitchen with a gas stove and blue pot.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The track begins with upbeat, rhythmic electronic BGM with a high-pitched synthesizer melody. A female voice speaks with high arousal and a fast speech rate, sounding energetic and persuasive. (2) A sharp 'crinkle' sound effect is heard as a box is handled. The narrator's tone is consistently friendly and high-pitched. (3) A distinct 'snip' sound effect from scissors triggers a transition. This is followed by a splashing sound of liquid and soft thuds as solids hit the bottom of a pot. The background music continues with a steady electronic beat. (4) The sounds of a spoon clinking against a ceramic bowl are audible under the narration. A playful 'pop' sound effect accentuates a specific point in the speech. (5) The female speakers alternate rapidly, maintaining a high-energy dialogue. The audio mix remains bright with a clear focus on the vocal track. A final musical flourish concludes the audio track.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Introduction -> Preparation -> Review -> Recommendation
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote and review the Vedan '隨緣' brand Monk Jumps Over the Wall soup available at Costco, highlighting its low calorie count, price, and ease of preparation for the Chinese New Year period.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of product packaging, mention of brand name and price, and strong verbal recommendation to purchase at Costco.

high_inference.freeDescribe: Fast-paced social media product review optimized for mobile viewing with heavy text overlays.
